name: Kimi K2.5
tagline: Native multimodal (image) model introducing instant + thinking modes and Agent Swarm (up to 100 coordinated sub-agents); 256K context.
seoTitle: Kimi K2.5 — Moonshot AI (Kimi) LLM specs
metaDescription: Kimi K2.5 (Moonshot AI (Kimi)), released 2026-01-27 — part of the Kimi K2 line. Native multimodal (image) model introducing instant + thinking modes and Agent…
overview: Kimi K2.5 is a large language model from Moonshot AI (Kimi), part of the Kimi K2 line. Released 2026-01-27. Moonshot's flagship open-weight 1-trillion-parameter Mixture-of-Experts model line (32B active) for agentic chat and coding.
What's notable in this version: Native multimodal (image) model introducing instant + thinking modes and Agent Swarm (up to 100 coordinated sub-agents); 256K context.
